note: CANONICAL known-bad registry (Uplevel 3 / T2 stage 2 — gates prove failure). Overwrite-synced by `sync.mjs qa` into every app's qa/known-bad/. prove-gates.mjs runs each gate against its checked-in fixture and FAILS if the gate does NOT reject the known-bad (a dead sensor). App-specific gates go in a sibling qa/known-bad/registry.json (app-owned, never clobbered). Excluded gates + why: EXCLUSIONS.md.

gates.why: Bad.tsx imports ActionSheetIOS from 'react-native' — must FAIL (iOS-only API breaks the feature on Android).
Bad.tsx calls Alert.prompt(...) — must FAIL (undefined on Android).
Bad.tsx has `if (Platform.OS !== 'ios') return` — must FAIL (gates whether a feature exists).
package.json depends on firebase — must FAIL (tenet: no tracking).
Bad.tsx uses c.fgOnInk as a foreground — must FAIL (invisible on the inverted dark-mode button).
screenshots.config.json caption says 'Free forever' — must FAIL (both stores reject price/promo text in a screenshot).
AnimatedSplash.tsx sets letterSpacing with no trailing pad — must FAIL (the 'd' clip regression).
app.json name has a space and no CFBundleName — must FAIL (Spotlight shows the space-stripped name).
no eas.json in the fixture — must FAIL (missing canonical eas.json).
package.json has no `test` script + fixture baseline sets testing/enforce — must FAIL (Tier-1 unit tests required).
no *.test/*.spec under src + testing/enforce — must FAIL (the trust core must be covered).
journey.json has steps but zero assert/assertNot + testing/enforce — must FAIL (a flow must prove an outcome).
no src/i18n module + i18n/enforce — must FAIL (every app ships translation-ready).
no <AppearanceToggle/> in source + theme/enforce — must FAIL (Settings must offer System/Light/Dark).
journey.json references @missingAnchor absent from selectors.json — lint-flows must exit non-zero (selector drift).
